name: Azure Video Indexer
description: Azure Video Indexer — video AI including content moderation, transcript, faces, and scene labels.

seo.title: Azure Video Indexer — Content Moderation API
seo.meta_description: Azure Video Indexer: Azure Video Indexer — video AI including content moderation, transcript, faces, and scene labels.

when_to_use: Indexing video libraries with automatic transcript and keyword tags
Detecting NSFW content and brand violations in video at scale
Extracting named entities and topic summaries from video content
Building content compliance workflows for video platforms

pros: Bundled with Azure Cognitive Services billing
Combines moderation with transcripts, faces, and scenes
Good for enterprises already on Microsoft stack
cons: Video moderation is secondary to indexing, not its focus
Latency unsuitable for real-time livestream review
Azure portal UX is notoriously clunky
Pricing per minute adds up fast at scale
review.verdict: Decent default if you already live in Azure, but dedicated moderation APIs beat it on accuracy and latency.
review.best_for: Enterprises on Azure needing VOD moderation plus metadata extraction in one call.
review.not_for: Real-time livestream safety or teams outside the Microsoft ecosystem.
